function.message: I couldn’t complete this inbox request because one of the five specified files does not exist: `50_finance/purchases/_2025_12_04__eur_000044__bill__house_mesh_esp32_order.md`. The non-underscored version exists, but the request explicitly lists five items including the missing path, so I made no edits.
function.rulebook_notes: Per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update, complete fully or do not mutate; if request is missing required canonical support, stop for clarification.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in /00_inbox/724_next-task.md requires OCR of five specific files. Direct read of the fifth path returned file-not-found, and a follow-up search in /50_finance/purchases returned 0 matches. Completing only four would be partial and violates the workflow requirement to avoid partial edits when task is not fully doable.
